# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

services:
  - name: auth-service
    url: http://auth-upstream
    routes:
      - name: auth-route
        paths:
          - /auth
        strip_path: true
        preserve_host: false

  - name: users-service
    url: http://users-upstream
    routes:
      - name: users-route
        paths:
          - /users
        strip_path: true
        preserve_host: false

  - name: orders-service
    url: http://orders-upstream
    routes:
      - name: orders-route
        paths:
          - /orders
        strip_path: true
        preserve_host: false

  - name: inventory-service
    url: http://inventory-upstream
    routes:
      - name: inventory-route
        paths:
          - /inventory
        strip_path: true
        preserve_host: false

upstreams:
  - name: auth-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    targets:
      - target: auth-1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: auth-2.internal:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: users-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    targets:
      - target: users-1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: users-2.internal:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: orders-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    targets:
      - target: orders-1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: orders-2.internal:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: inventory-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    targets:
      - target: inventory-1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: inventory-2.internal:8080
        weight: 100
